metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students develop foundational dance techniques and movement literacy as entry-level dancers. This course emphasizes basic technique, movement vocabulary, body awareness, and preparation for advanced dance study.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on foundational dance techniques and movement literacy for Grade 11 entry-level students.

big_ideas.statement: Dance technique provides a foundation for movement expression, control, and artistic communication.
big_ideas.elaboration: Learning foundational techniques develops body awareness, movement vocabulary, and the physical control necessary for artistic expression in any dance style.

big_ideas.statement: Basic movement principles apply across diverse dance styles and forms.
big_ideas.elaboration: Foundational concepts such as alignment, weight transfer, and movement quality provide essential tools applicable to any dance tradition or contemporary practice.

big_ideas.statement: Body awareness and proprioceptive development are central to learning dance.
big_ideas.elaboration: Dancers develop sensitive awareness of their bodies in space, understanding how different body parts interact and influence overall movement quality.

big_ideas.statement: Foundational learning creates pathways for continued artistic and technical development.
big_ideas.elaboration: Strong foundational skills provide the platform for advanced dance study and enable dancers to explore diverse styles with confidence and capability.

competencies.raw: Develop foundational dance techniques and movement vocabulary
i_can_statements: I can execute basic movement patterns with awareness of alignment and control
I can develop a foundational vocabulary of movement terms and concepts
I can practice fundamental techniques in various movement styles
I can apply basic movement principles to explore new movement possibilities

competencies.raw: Explore movement through improvisation and experimentation
i_can_statements: I can generate movement through guided improvisation exercises
I can experiment with different levels, directions, and movement qualities
I can respond to music, imagery, or creative prompts through movement
I can discover personal movement preferences and movement signatures

competencies.raw: Create short movement sequences and combinations
i_can_statements: I can memorize and execute short choreographed sequences
I can learn movement combinations and repeat them with growing accuracy
I can combine basic movements into simple sequences
I can develop fluidity and flow in executing movement combinations

competencies.raw: Explore diverse dance styles and movement traditions
i_can_statements: I can experience foundational techniques from various dance styles
I can explore different cultural dance traditions respectfully
I can identify characteristics of different dance styles
I can develop appreciation for diverse approaches to movement

competencies.raw: Develop body awareness and understanding of movement principles
i_can_statements: I can identify different body parts and their roles in movement
I can understand concepts like weight, space, and timing in movement
I can recognize how alignment affects movement quality and control
I can reflect on how my body feels during different movements

competencies.raw: Analyze personal movement and learning progress
i_can_statements: I can identify my strengths and areas for development as a dancer
I can reflect on my own movement quality and execution
I can evaluate my progress in learning techniques and movement vocabulary
I can set realistic goals for my dance development

competencies.raw: Understand connections between movement and emotion or meaning
i_can_statements: I can identify how different movements can express emotions or ideas
I can understand that movement carries cultural and personal significance
I can reflect on how my movement choices communicate meaning
I can appreciate how dancers use movement to tell stories or express concepts

competencies.raw: Observe and evaluate other dancers and dance performances
i_can_statements: I can watch other dancers and identify technical elements
I can appreciate different dancing styles and approaches
I can reflect on what I observe and learn from watching others
I can provide simple, constructive feedback to peer dancers

competencies.raw: Learn and practice technique through observation and instruction
i_can_statements: I can follow verbal and visual instructions from instructors
I can ask clarifying questions about movement techniques
I can observe and imitate demonstrated movements
I can apply feedback to improve my movement execution

competencies.raw: Communicate through movement and physical expression
i_can_statements: I can express emotions and ideas through movement
I can perform movements with awareness of audience
I can develop confidence in my physical self-expression
I can respond authentically to music and creative prompts
I can memorize short movement sequences and combinations
I can use counting or music to remember movement sequences
I can create personal notes about movement techniques
I can maintain accurate movement memory across multiple rehearsals

competencies.raw: Engage in dance discussions and share experiences
i_can_statements: I can discuss my dance learning experiences and challenges
I can talk about different dance styles and what I notice
I can listen respectfully to others' perspectives on dance
I can describe my feelings and thoughts about movement experiences

competencies.raw: Connect dance to music, rhythm, and temporal awareness
i_can_statements: I can move to different musical tempos and rhythms
I can understand how dancers use music in movement
I can count and use rhythm structures to guide movement
I can explore the relationship between music and movement expression

competencies.raw: Explore connections between dance and other art forms
i_can_statements: I can understand how dance relates to visual art and design
I can explore connections between dance and storytelling
I can recognize how dance combines with other arts in multimedia presentations
I can appreciate the interdisciplinary nature of artistic expression

competencies.raw: Develop awareness of dance in diverse cultural and contemporary contexts
i_can_statements: I can learn about dance traditions from different cultures
I can explore dance in contemporary society and popular culture
I can understand the role of dance in cultural expression and community
I can develop respect for diverse dance traditions and practices

competencies.raw: Expand into advanced dance learning pathways
i_can_statements: I can prepare myself for more advanced dance studies
I can explore different dance specializations and interests
I can develop practices and habits that support continued learning
I can envision myself as a developing dancer with future potential

areas.name: Basic Technique and Movement Fundamentals
topics: Fundamental movements: walking, running, skipping, sliding
Levels and use of vertical space

areas.name: Body Awareness and Control
topics: Isolated movement of different body parts
Flexibility and range of motion exploration
Safe movement practices and body care

areas.name: Movement Exploration and Expression
topics: Movement qualities: light, heavy, quick, sustained, flowing, sharp
Movement in response to music and rhythm
Narrative and emotional expression through movement

areas.name: Introduction to Dance Styles and Traditions
areas.raw: Introduction to Dance Styles and Traditions
topics: Cultural dance traditions from various communities
First Nations and Indigenous dance traditions
Respect and cultural awareness in dance learning
